name: pr-code-review
description: PR code review comparing current branch vs develop (merge-base). Analyzes .ts, .tsx, .js, .jsx files for bugs, performance issues, and best practice violations. Generates a Markdown report in Portuguese with severity ratings.

interface.shortDescription: Full PR review vs develop branch with Markdown report in Portuguese
interface.longDescription: Reviews all changes in the current branch against develop (merge-base), identifying bugs (CRITICO), performance issues (AVISO), and best practice violations (SUGESTAO). Generates a structured Markdown report saved at the project root.
